intent: Converge remaining global frontend sizing tokens and make the all-scope fluid sizing checker pass.
assumptions: PR5 covers global tokens, CTA/nav decoration, devtools, and all-scope tail findings.
Global token pixel values can be converted to rem equivalents to preserve desktop appearance.
IntersectionObserver rootMargin and offscreen clipboard staging may remain explicit non-visual exceptions.
risks: tokens.css affects multiple themes and shared components.
Tailwind arbitrary calc values need underscore spacing after rem conversion.
Visual proof depends on the current logged-in /files page.
steps: Add a failing test for signed fixed px detection.
Implement global scope and signed px matching.
Convert remaining global fixed visible dimensions to rem.
Mark non-visible observer and clipboard exceptions explicitly.
Run all-scope sizing check, tests, lint, build, and browser verification.
